title: NEHU Result 2026 - North Eastern Hill University Ph.D Results (OUT)

detail.title: NEHU Result 2026 - North Eastern Hill University Ph.D Results (OUT)
detail.short_info: NEHU Result 2026 : North Eastern Hill University Result 2026 has been released on nehu.ac.in. Here is the direct Link to check your UG and PG Courses (Ph.D) Results Online.

sections.heading: NEHU Result 2026 - North Eastern Hill University Ph.D Results (OUT)

content.text: NEHU Result 2026: North Eastern Hill University has declared the Ph.D results on nehu.ac.in. Students can check their NEHU results 2026 online by entering roll number/registration number. Download your NEHU mark sheet PDF using the direct link below.

items: Result Status: Released
University: North Eastern Hill University (NEHU)
Courses: Ph.D
Result Available At: nehu.ac.in
Documents Required: Roll Number/Registration Number

sections.heading: NEHU Result 2026 Direct Link - Check Here
How to Check NEHU Result 2026 Online?

content.text: Students can check their NEHU result 2026 for Ph.D by following these simple steps:

items: Visit Official Website: Go to nehu.ac.in
Find Results Section: Click on "Results" or "Examination" tab on homepage
Select Your Exam: Choose Ph.D from the list
Enter Details: Input your Roll Number and Registration Number
Submit & View: Click "Submit" to view your NEHU result 2026
Download: Save/print your mark sheet PDF for future reference

content.text: To check your NEHU results 2026, students must have the following details ready:

items: Roll Number (as mentioned on admit card)
Registration Number or Application Number
Date of Birth (if required)
Course and Semester details

content.text: After checking your NEHU result 2026, follow these steps to download your mark sheet:

items: View your result on the screen
Click on "Download Mark Sheet" or "Print" button
Save the PDF file to your device
Take multiple printouts for official use
Verify all details (name, roll number, marks) are correct
